name_en: M24932 Deep Blue. This Noé MM bucket bag from the Nautical series reinterprets the style with soft Epi leather, creating a vintage aesthetic. Epi leather becomes smoother over time while maintaining its original beauty. Dimensions: 27×33×20cm
